rationale: Gov't Code §2306.072 governs the Department of Housing and Community Affairs' annual low income housing report. It contains no provisions related to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the director shall prepare and submit to the board an annual report of the department's housing activities for the preceding year.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses annual reporting requirements for low income housing programs and does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax, or Tax Code §11.13.
